title: Crispy Herbal Indian Tamarind Fritters
description: A festive, flaky fritter bursting with tangy tamarind and aromatic herbs, air‑fried to a crisp golden finish for a kosher‑friendly snack.

ingredients.name: Tamarind pulp
ingredients.notes: soaked in 30 ml warm water, mashed into a smooth paste

instructions: In a bowl, combine tamarind paste, all‑purpose flour, besan, baking powder, turmeric, chili powder, and salt; whisk until a thick batter forms.
Fold in chopped coriander, mint, minced garlic, and sliced green chili; add water gradually to reach a pourable yet thick consistency.
Preheat your air fryer to 200 °C (400 °F). Lightly spray a non‑stick air‑fryer basket or line with parchment to prevent sticking.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the basket, leaving space between each fritter; drizzle a light spray of oil over the tops.
Air‑fry for 10–12 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden brown and crisp.
Remove and let cool on a rack for a minute; serve hot with your choice of mint‑y yogurt dip or tangy tamarind chutney.
Enjoy the crispy, aromatic fritters as a festive snack or side.
